missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If they want a different amount, they can choose to enter a custom value instead.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall permit the user to enter a custom value if they want a different amount.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow the user to select an amount to withdraw from a list of options.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not mention that amounts are selected from a predefined list; it only states that users can choose an amount or enter a custom value.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall verify the transaction after the user enters an amount.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is not ambiguous, but it does not fully capture the condition under which verification occurs (i.e., only if the initial attempt fails).
